title: ContentBrief
description: Normalized input contract produced by the intake stage. Represents one content production request.

brief_id.description: Unique identifier for this brief. Format: brief_{run_id}.

goal.description: What the content should achieve. Written as a plain instruction.

language.description: BCP-47 language code for the output content (e.g. en, uk, ru).

channel.description: Target distribution channel (e.g. youtube, instagram, tiktok). Null if not specified.

geo.description: Target geography as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or region name. Null if not specified.

vertical.description: Content topic vertical or industry (e.g. food, tech, lifestyle). Null if not specified.

target_audience.description: Brief description of the intended audience. Null if not specified.

duration_sec.description: Target duration in seconds. Required for video format. Null for non-video formats.

aspect_ratio.description: Target aspect ratio for video or image output. Null if not specified.

style.description: Visual or tonal style direction (e.g. minimalist, cinematic, documentary). Null if not specified.

constraints.description: List of explicit constraints or rules this content must follow.

required_unknowns.description: List of field names that could not be determined from the input and need clarification.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this brief was created.
